metadata.name: Dies Irae
metadata.description:
[img]https://i.imgur.com/pdGl7Bu.png[/img] [h2][i]First note: Overture[/i][/h2] [hr][/hr]
[i]A large-scale expansion for The Binding of Isaac: Repentance.[/i]
Dies Irae is a multi-part expansion mod introducing new characters, mechanics, enemies, music, transformations, and dozens of unlocks.
[b]This release contains the first part: Overture.[/b] The first movement of a larger vision.
More is already in development.
[h2]Characters[/h2] [b][img]https://i.imgur.com/WM8UGmU.png[/img]David[/b] A king chosen to prove his worth. To earn God’s love, David must complete divine challenges throughout his run. Failing a challenge results in broken hearts. Choose wisely — faith is fragile.
[b][img]https://i.imgur.com/G9VGbYH.png[/img]Elijah[/b] His strength comes from his will… but will you surrender it?
Elijah cannot pick up items in the normal way. Instead, he relies on beggars for survival.
• Unique gameplay loop centered around sacrifice and reward • API support included for custom Elijah beggars
[i]Note: Elijah is not compatible with modded beggars/slots by default. A simple API text file is included to help modders integrate their content.[/i]
[h2]Items & Unlocks[/h2] • 33 unlockable items • +1 starting unlocked item • 7 new pills • 4 character-unique items
Every unlock is tied to progression. Every reward must be earned.
[h2]Beggars[/h2] • 7 unlockable beggars • +1 starting beggar • 17 Elijah-exclusive beggars
[i]Note: One beggar is not compatible with modded familiars. API support is included for modders who wish to integrate their own familiars.[/i]
[h2]Additional Content[/h2] • New transformation • New Flooded Caves music • 2 new enemies in the Scarred Womb And more. [hr][/hr] [h2]⚠ Requirements[/h2] [b]This mod requires REPENTOGON to function.[/b] Please install it before enabling Dies Irae. [h3]Coming in Batch II:[/h3] • Tainted David • Tainted Elijah • At least one new character (+ tainted variant) • 42+ additional unlocks • And way more! This is only the beginning. [h2]Music References[/h2] Official Dies Irae playlist: [hr][/hr] [h2]Credits[/h2] [b]Coding Team[/b] • Joffe [h2]Join the Team [/h2] Want to contribute? To test new releases? • Send a DM to Joffe on Discord: joffe2001 • Or join the mod server: https://discord.gg/7fCM8DSeXw [h2]Bug Reports[/h2] Please report all bugs in our Discord server. We actively fix issues and improve the mod.
